overview.title: 🔗 OVERVIEW
items: Analyzes mod dependencies and relationships
Detects missing or conflicting dependencies
Shows dependency chain for each mod
Helps resolve dependency issues before translation

scan.title: 🔍 SCANNING
items: Click '🔍 Scan Dependencies' to analyze all mods
System reads About.xml and modDependencies files
Detects direct and indirect dependencies
Shows dependency tree for each mod

results.title: 📊 RESULTS
items: ✅ Valid — all dependencies satisfied
⚠️ Missing — some dependencies not found
❌ Conflict — dependency version mismatch
ℹ️ Info — additional information

dependency_chain.title: ⛓ DEPENDENCY CHAIN
items: Shows full dependency path for each mod
Helps identify which mods need to be translated first
Highlights circular dependencies (if any)
Click on mod name to open its folder

actions.title: 🔧 ACTIONS
items: 📋 Copy Report — copy dependency info to clipboard
🔍 Find Missing — locate missing dependency mods
📁 Open Folder — open mod folder in file explorer
🔄 Refresh — rescan all dependencies

tips.title: 💡 TIPS
items: Always check dependencies before mass translation
Translate required mods first (those with no dependencies)
Missing dependencies may cause translation errors
Circular dependencies are rare but problematic
